stepAnswer: B.Using a 10% $$p-value$$ cutoff, the null hypothesis should be rejected.
stepBody: Given that the computed $$p-value$$ is $$0.0825$$, which of the following are true? Select all that may apply.
answerLatex: B.Using a 10% $$p-value$$ cutoff, the null hypothesis should be rejected.
choices: A.Using an 8% $$p-value$$ cutoff, the null hypothesis should be rejected.
B.Using a 10% $$p-value$$ cutoff, the null hypothesis should be rejected.
C.There is an $$8.25\%$$ chance that the null hypothesis is true.
D.There is an $$8.25\%$$ chance that the alternative hypothesis is true.
